contractors.name: GreenHome HVAC Solutions
contractors.description: GreenHome HVAC Solutions is the GTA's leading energy retrofit contractor, specializing in cold climate heat pump installations and whole-home energy upgrades. With over 1,200 projects completed, they bring deep expertise in maximizing rebate eligibility for every project.

contractors.name: EcoRenovate Ontario
contractors.description: EcoRenovate Ontario offers comprehensive home energy solutions from insulation to solar PV. Their team of certified technicians handles every aspect of the retrofit process, from energy assessment to final inspection.

contractors.name: Volta Energy Systems
contractors.description: Volta Energy Systems focuses on the electrification side of home energy upgrades. They are the go-to contractor for solar PV, battery storage, and EV charger installations in Toronto's east end.
